description:
Hermes Agent: https://www.hostg.xyz/SHJJC
Code: Dubibubii for 10% off

Boris Cherny, the engineer behind Claude Code, just revealed how he actually uses Opus 4.7. Most people are using it wrong.
In this video, I break down the exact 6 step system he uses daily to get better outputs, run longer tasks, and remove almost all friction from Claude Code. Everything here is practical and beginner friendly. No coding background needed.

/go Skill Prompt: https://docs.google.com/document/d/12BuxJH5MbNHX13vSISdD2QttZHgoKy_AA4DEVqNvOHY/edit?usp=sharing
Discord Community: https://discord.gg/vibebuilders
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/dubibuilds/

What you will learn:

Auto Mode. No more permission prompts
Effort Levels. Why xhigh beats max
Focus Mode. Stop watching, start trusting
/fewer-permission-prompts. Remove repeated friction
Recaps. Never lose context again
Boris’s prompt style plus /go skill. The real multiplier
This is how you go from basic prompting to actually running multiple agents and scaling Claude properly.
If you are still using Claude like 4.6, you are leaving performance on the table.

Time Stamps:
0:00 Intro + Bonus Tip
0:55 Tip 1 - Boris's Favourite New Feature
2:04 Tip 2 - Effort Levels
4:39 Tip 3 - Trust in Claude
5:44 Tip 4 - Boris's Favourite Skill
6:46 Tip 5 - New Opus 4.7 Feature
7:48 Tip 6 - How Boris gets 3x more out of Claude
